common.reset_confirm: Discard everything and go back to the example?

reset_dialog.title: Discard everything?
reset_dialog.message: You'll lose what you have now and go back to the initial example. This can't be undone.

save_dialog.title: Save song
save_dialog.subtitle_studio: You're about to save the current studio set to your local library.
save_dialog.subtitle_code: You're about to save the current code to your local library.

settings.title: Settings
settings.theme_desc: Switch between light and dark. Matches your OS the first time.
settings.language_desc: Available in neutral Spanish, English and Portuguese.
settings.music_desc: Your local library of saved songs.
settings.packs_desc: {{loaded}} of {{total}} community packs active. Each pack adds new samples.
settings.credits_intro: Xpendia Studio stands on the shoulders of these amazing open-source projects:

midi.title: MIDI → Strudel
midi.description: Upload a MIDI file and we'll convert it to ready-to-play Strudel code you can remix.

midi_player.title: MIDI player
midi_player.subtitle: Plays through the master · spectrum and scope react to it
midi_player.convert_title: Open the converter pre-loaded with this file

my_music.title: My music
my_music.empty: No saved songs yet. Make something and hit 💾 save.
my_music.kind_mismatch: This song belongs to the other mode. Switch mode to open it.

fx.fx_hint: ROOM = reverb send · DELAY = echo · GAIN = master volume. Changes apply to the playing pattern in real time.
fx.eq_hint: HPF = high-pass filter (cuts lows). LPF = low-pass filter (cuts highs). Neutral: HPF=20Hz · LPF=20kHz.

dancing.permission_body_part1: Turn on your camera so we can detect your body and draw it in neon over a black background.
dancing.permission_footer: Requires HTTPS or localhost. The music keeps playing.

errors.no_display_media: Your browser doesn't support screen recording.

footer.tagline_rest: to producing music with AI · made with code, not prompts.

code.shortcut_eval: <kbd>⌘/Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Enter</kbd> — evaluates the code and plays it. If a pattern is already playing, it's replaced instantly.
code.flow_1: Pick a loop from the 📚 load loop… menu (it replaces the editor content).
code.flow_3: Edit the code freely. With live on, every change re-evaluates automatically (200 ms debounce).
code.flow_4: Tweak the FX / EQ knobs at the bottom: they apply in real time to whatever you're writing.
code.palette_body: Chips grouped by category (drums, patterns, sources, banks, synths, soundfonts…) are ready-to-insert code snippets. Click a chip to inject it at the cursor; you can also drag it onto the editor. The palette is an accordion: collapse the groups you're not using.
code.tap_body: Hit ♪ tap 2 or more times to the pulse you want. We compute the BPM from the median interval between taps and apply it to the pattern via .cpm(). If you stop for more than 2 seconds, the counter resets.
code.fx_body: The knobs wrap everything that's playing with Strudel operators: .room(reverb), .delay(), .lpf(freq), .hpf(freq) and .gain(). Double-click a knob to type an exact value. The Spectrum tab shows the FFT as bars and Oscilloscope shows the waveform.
code.export_mp3: 🎵 mp3 — records in real time from the audio context and downloads a 192 kbps MP3.
code.export_dancing: 💃 dancing — fullscreen mode with your camera detecting the body in neon.

studio.flow_1: Start with a default set (drums + melody). Add more tracks with the + button at the bottom.
studio.flow_2: Hit ▶ play. You'll hear everything that's ON.
studio.flow_3: Change whatever you want: banks, patterns, notes, volume. Edits apply automatically.
studio.tracks_body: Five types available: Drums, Bass, Melody / Arpeggio, Strings and Pad. Each has its own ON/OFF switch and volume slider. Click the row to collapse/expand.
studio.segments_body: Each track is split into segments (the numbered squares #1, #2…). Every segment can have a different length (bars), pattern, bank or notes. Use them to build intro / verse / chorus / bridge inside the same track.
studio.segments_silence: ∅ silence — turns a segment into a rest.
studio.segments_dblclick: double-click a segment — shortcut to silence it.
studio.banks_body: 49 banks: TR-909, TR-808, TR-707, LinnDrum, MPC, CR-78, etc. Some need extra packs enabled from 📦 packs in the header.
studio.patterns_body: 80+ patterns grouped by style: rock, pop, hip-hop, latin, electronic, jazz, cinematic / spatial (Zimmer, interstellar…) and rolls / fills.
studio.tap_body: Hit ♪ tap 2 or more times to the pulse you want. We compute the BPM from the median interval between taps and apply it to the whole set. If you stop for more than 2 seconds, the counter resets.
studio.fx_body: The FX (reverb / delay / gain) and EQ (HPF / LPF) knobs affect everything that's playing. The Spectrum and Oscilloscope tabs are visualizations of the master audio.
studio.export_mp3: 🎵 mp3 — real-time recording and download as 192 kbps MP3.
studio.export_dancing: 💃 dancing — fullscreen mode with your camera detecting the body in neon.
